## Describe the bug

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To reproduce

Steps to reproduce the behaviour:

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include error messages or screenshots if helpful.

## Environment

- Deployment mode: [self-host (Docker) / local dev / SaaS]
- OS:
- Browser (if frontend):
- Node.js version (if running from source):
- App version / commit SHA:

## Logs

```
Paste relevant backend/frontend logs here. Redact secrets and tokens.
```

## Additional context

Anything else that might help us diagnose the issue.

> Security issue? Do not file it here. Follow the private process in SECURITY.md.
